regime_justification: USDJPY 158.91, stable near MOF watch levels; intervention rhetoric active (Katayama May 26); JGB 10Y at 2.78% (30-year high); VIX 16.7 calm; oil sliding -6% aids inflation reprieve but spread 187 bps still wide; Stage 1 Pressure Building regime persists

domino_stage.label: Pressure Building
domino_stage.justification: USDJPY grinding near 159, MOF rhetoric escalating, JGB yields at 30-year highs, US-JP spread 187 bps; not yet at intervention threshold but volatility bid muted and carry mechanics intact

1w.label: Unlikely
1w.driver: Spread intact at 187 bps, vol 7.7% subdued, oil -6% easing import pressure, no BOJ meeting until June 15-16; intervention risk present but not imminent absent USDJPY spike

2w.label: Watchful
2w.driver: June 15-16 BOJ meeting approaches; if oil stabilizes and JGB stays elevated, any hawkish signal or intervention rhetoric could compress carry; applied unwind prior as tiebreaker given fragile setup

3w.label: Watchful
3w.driver: Post-BOJ window; market pricing in 0-25bp hike probability rising; if delivered, spread narrows and vol spikes; scenario-weighted grade reflects catalyst risk

4w.label: Unlikely
4w.driver: If BOJ holds or signals gradualism, carry extends; if hikes, initial unwind absorbs by week 4 as Fed data counters; mean reversion logic suggests relief by late June

bottom_line: Pressure building but not breaking. USDJPY 158.91 stable, spread 187 bps wide, JGB 10Y at 2.78% (30yr high), oil down 6% easing yen import cost. MOF Katayama vocal but no intervention yet. BOJ June 15-16 meeting is the hinge: hawkish surprise compresses spread, dovish confirmation extends carry. VIX 16.7, vol muted. Crypto range-bound. 1-week D, 2-3w watchful C (BOJ catalyst), 4w relief to D. Stage 1 holds.

trigger_map.note: USDJPY 158.91, 18 pips below 160; Katayama verbal intervention May 26 ('ready to act'); no rate-check rumors yet but setup primed
June 15-16 meeting; March minutes hawkish but April core CPI 1.4% (4yr low) reduces urgency; market pricing 0-25bp probability rising
Currently 2.78%, at 30-year high; break above 2.8% would signal fiscal/inflation stress intensifying; 2 bps away
MOVE data unavailable; US 10Y vol appears contained; would need rates shock to activate
WTI -6% on Iran deal progress; ¥/bbl relief to 14,409; Hormuz reopening optimism removes near-term trigger

narrative.p1: Overnight: WTI plunged 6% to $90.69 on Iran deal optimism, easing Japan's import inflation (¥/bbl down to 14,409 from ~15,900). USDJPY stable 158.91 (-0.2%), 18 pips below 160. MOF Katayama issued verbal intervention warning May 26 ('ready to act'). JGB 10Y hit 2.78%, a 30-year high, despite core CPI slowing to 1.4% (4yr low). PM Takaichi met Ueda May 22, urging BOJ to coordinate with fiscal stimulus. No stage change from yesterday's yellow/Stage 1; pressure building but no trigger yet.
narrative.p2: Quant anchors: US-JP spread 178 bps (corrected: 4.56 - 2.78), carry-to-vol proxy 23.1 (178/7.7), both supportive of carry extension. USDJPY 5d +0.1% (pace benign), 60d mean ~158.5 (neutral). JGB at 30yr high signals fiscal/inflation tension but core CPI collapse buys BOJ time. Stage 1 Pressure Building: spread wide, MOF verbal, BOJ June 15-16 meeting the hinge. 1w grade D: no imminent catalyst, vol muted, oil relief. 2-3w grade C: applied unwind prior as tiebreaker—BOJ meeting could deliver hawkish surprise (March minutes showed urgency), and if USDJPY spikes to 160+ pre-meeting, MOF may intervene. Data genuinely ambiguous (JGB high vs CPI low), so prior leans one notch more alert. 4w D: post-meeting mean reversion if hike absorbed or no hike delivered.
narrative.p3: Crypto: BTC $76,643, +1.2% bounce from $74,500 floor (May 22-23). Whale accumulation hit yearly high (1,282 wallets holding 1k+ BTC), strongest Whale vs Retail divergence since Nov 2024. ETF outflows $1.5B but floor held at Strategy's $75.7k cost basis. Fear & Greed 25 (extreme fear) typically precedes reversals. Range $74.5k-$78k intact, 200d MA ceiling $82.2k untouched 7 weeks. Oil drop +equity strength gave BTC room but vol subdued. Implication: risk-on rotation stalled; crypto waiting for macro clarity (Fed, BOJ, Hormuz). If BOJ hikes and yen rips, BTC likely tests $74.5k again as carry unwind drains liquidity. If carry extends, ceiling $78-80k in play. Neutral-to-cautious; watch BOJ June 15-16.

horizon_rationale.w1_w2: Week 1 benign: no BOJ meeting, oil sliding eases inflation, USDJPY stable, vol low. Week 2 BOJ meeting June 15-16 approaches; if oil stabilizes and JGB holds elevated, any hawkish signal or MOF rate-check rumors shift setup fragile. Grade lifts D→C.
horizon_rationale.w2_w3: Week 2-3 straddles BOJ decision. If hike delivered (25bp to 1.0%), spread compresses, vol spikes, USDJPY drops, carry unwinds. If hold, carry extends but market may price next hike, keeping C watchful. Scenario-weighted grade C reflects catalyst binary.
horizon_rationale.w3_w4: Week 3-4 post-decision absorption. If BOJ hikes, initial vol spike fades as Fed data counters (Dec hike 40% priced keeps US yields supported). If no hike, carry trade extends and relief rally likely. Mean reversion logic suggests D by week 4 unless secondary shock (MOF intervention, geopolitical flare). Grade eases C→D.

watch_list: USDJPY daily close above 159.5 (triggers MOF rate-check speculation)
BOJ June 15-16 decision & Ueda press conference tone
BTC daily close below $74,500 (retests Strategy support, signals risk-off acceleration)
